content.en:
"The copying talent has really changed too much!"

Ye Tian was quite excited and excited.

For him, the biggest change is the change of the copy body, although he can condense two copy bodies before, but in fact, they are all doppelgangers, but now after the copy talent is upgraded and promoted, there is no difference between the copy body and the clone.

Even if the main body falls, the replicated body will transform into a real body.

That is, he is very difficult to kill, as long as any of the replica bodies are alive, he cannot be killed.

Moreover, he now duplicates not just two, but five.

In other words, he can now form a total of six bodies with his body, and the enemy must kill all six of his bodies at the same time before he can really kill him, and it is very difficult, or even impossible, to do so. "Two-Three-Seven"

Other than that.

After the replication talent is upgraded, it has been condensed on the Immortal Ancestral Endowment, and it is very easy for him to copy other people's Immortal Ancestral Endowment now, and he can copy it successfully in an instant, and he can also make the Immortal Ancestral Endowment of the same kind fuse, as long as there are a large number of Immortal Ancestral Endowment, he can fuse it into a more powerful talent.

And the range of the copy talent has also been greatly increased, about ten times the range.

I have to say that today's copying talent is really much stronger than before.

The first time.

Ye Tian condensed a new copy body, which was equivalent to a real body.

The Dark Forbidden Realm sits on a body, that is, the original body, a copy of the body enters the other side of the source sea, and lives in seclusion in a treasure land.

On the side of the Abyssal Land, the replica body was also condensed, and two bodies were condensed at once.

In this way, on the side of the Abyssal Land, it is equivalent to having three replica bodies, and the three replicating bodies enter all parts of the Abyss Land to find the Void Beast.

He didn't look for the Void Beast before, but the Void Beast was of little use to him.

But now, he can fuse the Immortal Ancestral Endowment, so he naturally wants to find the Void Beasts and copy the Immortal Ancestral Endowment on them.

As time passed, Ye Tian's three replica bodies found a lot of Void Beasts in the Abyssal Land, and once they copied the Immortal Ancestral Endowment on their bodies, they immediately left and did not fight with them.

Ye Tian couldn't kill the Void Beasts, so there was no need to entangle with them, it was a pure waste of time.

It's a pity that the number of Void Beasts in the Abyss Land is not very large, so if Ye Tian wants to use the talents on these Void Beasts to fuse them into higher-level talents, it is almost impossible to do so.

However, at least this was a good start, and if he found some Void Beasts in the future, wouldn't he be able to fuse them into higher-level talents?

Spend this day.

The Abyss Land ushered in the existence of an Immortal Realm, and the purpose of his coming here was to deal with the third-order Void Beast on the Black Island, and no one could shake the third-order Void Beast without the Immortal Realm Lord making a move. Therefore, he came

In the void not far from the Black Island, an Immortal Realm Lord came here, and the reason why they dared to come here again was naturally because of that Immortal Realm Lord.

"Void Sword Lord, this is it!"

An Immortal Realm Lord said respectfully.

The Void Sword Lord, one of the Immortal Realm Lords, is also the Immortal Realm existence who once went to the Source Sea and took away the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree.

In the Endless Time and Space Territory, many Immortal Realm Lords did not appear very often, or were not in the same circle as other Eternal Realms and Half-Step Eternal Realms at all, and it was rare to see them in ordinary times.

However, the Void Sword Lord is very active, and he can be regarded as one of the Immortal Realm Lords who are easy to see.

It stands to reason that the Lord of the Immortal Realm will not care about the resources here in the Abyssal Land, but the Lord of the Void Sword can see that he wants everything, because he wants to cultivate a lot of concubines, so the resources that are useless to the Immortal Realm will also be collected.

Besides, the Abyssal Land was not dangerous to him, so he would come here to harvest a wave of resources.

Wow!

The Void Sword Lord stepped over to the Black Island.

Suddenly, the third-order void beast made a move.

Rumble!!!!

The third-order Void Beast rushed towards the Void Sword Lord, and the Void Rules protected the whole body, making the body illusory, and its hands turned into black roulettes, suppressing the Void Sword Lord.

This is the real attack of the third-order Void Beast, and it will go all out to deal with the Void Sword Lord alone.

If other Immortal Realm Lords came here and fought against the third-order Void Beast alone, I am afraid that they would be killed soon.

"Slash!"

The Void Sword Lord condensed his own eternal will and the innate Void Sword Eternal Rules, fused it into his own sword, and pierced the body of the third-order Void Beast with one sword.......

But this sword seemed to have pierced into the void, but it still brought some injuries to the third-order void beast.

However, the third-order void beast healed quickly.

Thundered!!!!

The Void Sword Lord and the Third-Order Void Beast were constantly fighting, and it seemed that the Void Sword Lord had the upper hand, but in fact, it was difficult to kill the Third-Order Void Beast.

Abrupt.

The Void Sword Lord created a world of Eternal Realm rules, trapping the third-order Void Beast and constantly fighting against it.

At this time, the Immortal Realm under the command of the Void Sword Lord immediately poured into the Black Island and began to collect many resources on the Black Island.

This is the plan of the Void Sword Lord.

He wasn't going to kill this third-order void beast at all, because he wasn't sure either, all he valued was the resources here.

Soon, all the resources on this black island were collected, and even some of the veins were uprooted.

"Let's go!"

The Void Sword Lord urged his subordinates to leave the Eternal Realm.

Whoa!!

An Eternal Realm Lord shuttled away, so as not to be chased and killed by the third-order Void Beast.

The third-order void beast had a very strong sense of belonging to the territory, so when it saw that its territory was so completely destroyed, it was completely crazy, and the last reason was lost.

But even so, he still couldn't beat the Void Sword Lord, and was completely suppressed by the Void Sword Lord 2.7, if it weren't for his Void Talent being too terrifying, otherwise he would have been hit hard.

But after fighting for a while, the Void Sword Lord didn't want to continue fighting.

As a result, the Void Sword Lord turned into a sword light that tore through time and space, and fled, leaving the third-order Void Beast's perception range in the blink of an eye.

Rumble!!!!

The third-order Void Beast left the island and began to take revenge, killing it once it encountered the Eternal Realm or the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

After Ye Tian learned the news, he prepared to leave.

Not only Ye Tian, but the other half-step Eternal Realm or Eternal Realm were all ready to leave.

But when Ye Tian left the Abyssless Land, not long after he came out, the void area in the distance began to ripple.

Next, he saw an amazing scene. _
